title: Rubric Definition
description: Defines evaluation dimensions the LLM tracks during a conversation session.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier referenced by scenario rubric_ref.

title.description: Display title shown on the debrief screen.

dimensions.description: Evaluation criteria that the LLM tracks turn-by-turn.

id.description: Machine-readable identifier for this dimension (referenced in rubric_observations).

label.description: Creator-friendly label shown on the debrief screen.

description.description: What the LLM should look for when scoring this dimension.

weight.description: Relative importance when computing the total score (higher = more important).

max_score.description: Maximum points possible for this dimension per session.

dimensions.label: Communication Clarity
dimensions.description: Does the player communicate ideas clearly and concisely without rambling?

dimensions.label: STAR Structure
dimensions.description: Does the player structure behavioral answers with Situation, Task, Action, Result?

dimensions.label: Genuine Enthusiasm
dimensions.description: Does the player show authentic interest in the role and company?
